title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search reviews over 20 recent AI developments including language models GLM 5.2 and Kimi K2.7, video generation tools like Flex4DHuman and VideoMDM, text-to-speech system Dots, and avatar/3D projects like MeshFlow and MoVerse. The video also documents the discontinuation of Claude Fable Mythos and covers multimodal capabilities like Gemini live translation.
writeup: This AI Search roundup covers more than 20 recent developments across several categories. On language models, it reviews GLM 5.2 and Kimi K2.7; for video generation, it covers Flex4DHuman and VideoMDM; for speech, it covers the Dots text-to-speech system; and for avatars and 3D, it covers MeshFlow and MoVerse. The video also documents the discontinuation of Claude Fable Mythos and covers multimodal features including Gemini live translation. Underlying concepts touched on include sparse attention and vision-language models.
